text: On ALL text inputs with submit buttons (chat input on Sketch page, Add Feature on Plan, Comment on Plan, etc), pressing cmd + enter / ctrl + enter should submit

proposedTasks.title: Add Cmd+Enter / Ctrl+Enter submit shortcut to all text inputs with submit buttons
proposedTasks.description:
Audit every text input paired with a submit button across the app (Sketch chat input, Plan 'Add Feature' input, Plan comment input, Verify feedback input, and any others) and attach a keydown listener that submits on Cmd+Enter (macOS) or Ctrl+Enter (Windows/Linux). Acceptance criteria:
- All identified inputs submit on Cmd+Enter (macOS) and Ctrl+Enter (other OSes)
- Existing Enter/click submit behavior is unchanged
- Works for both single-line and multi-line (textarea) inputs
- Extract a shared hook or utility (e.g. useSubmitShortcut) so future inputs get the behavior automatically
- Unit tests verify the keyboard shortcut triggers submit and that plain Enter does not (for multi-line inputs)

taskTitles: Add Cmd+Enter / Ctrl+Enter submit shortcut to all text inputs with submit buttons
